title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Recruitment
text:
| Interview for the short listed candidates for the selection to the post of Village Resource Person SC : 05,ST : 06,UR: 13,Women :15 for ” the Social Audit Unit” of Tripura will be held on 6th & 7th July 2023. | Interview for the short listed candidates for the selection to the post of Village Resource Person SC : 05,ST : 06,UR: 13,Women :15 for ” the Social Audit Unit” of Tripura will be held on 6th & 7th July 2023. | 27/06/2023 | 31/07/2023 | |

Executive Magistrate under West Tripura District. | Candidate for the post of Assistant Public Prosecutor – 29 (twenty nine) posts in the court of Ld.Judicial Magistrate and Ld. Executive Magistrate under West Tripura District. | 30/05/2023 | 15/06/2023 | |

Addl Session Judge, under West Tripura District. | Candidate for the post of Public Prosecutor and Addl. Public Prosecutor – (3 posts) in the court of Ld. Session Judge and Ld. Addl Session Judge, under West Tripura District. | 30/05/2023 | 15/06/2023 | |
| Notification for the post of Assistant Public Prosecutor 3 post and Assistant Public Prosecutor 1 post at Agartala West Tripura . | Notification for the post of Assistant Public Prosecutor 3 post for the court of Judicial Magistrate 1st class and Assistant Public Prosecutor 1 post for the Executive Magistrate’s Court at Agartala West Tripura . | 09/09/2022 | 30/09/2022 | | | AGNIVEER VAYU INTAKE 01/2022 | INDIAN AIR FORCE INVITES ONLINE APPLICATIONS FROM UNMARRIED MALE (INDIAN/NEPALESE) CANDIDATES FOR SELECTION TEST FOR AGNIVEER VAYU INTAKE 01/2022
UNDER AGNIPATH SCHEME.
